title: JACK HENRY & ASSOCIATES ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2024 DECONVERSION REVENUE RESULTS
text: MONETT, Mo. , Oct. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that deconversion revenue for the fiscal first quarter, ended September 30, 2023 was $4.1 million.

title: JACK HENRY & ASSOCIATES TO PROVIDE WEBCAST OF FIRST QUARTER 2024 EARNINGS CALL
text: MONETT, Mo. , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that it will host a live Webcast of its first quarter 2024 earnings conference call on November 8, 2023.

title: Jack Henry & Associates: 'Vertical' Software Is Eating The World
text: Jack Henry & Associates is a software company that provides technology solutions for small banks and credit unions, allowing them to compete with larger financial institutions. The company has a history of consistent growth and strategic acquisitions, resulting in strong revenue and earnings per share growth. Recent events, such as the failures of small- to mid-size banks, have raised concerns for Jack Henry's customer base and future growth prospects. However, the company's track record and valuation make it an attractive investment opportunity.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Extends MDT Partnership to Boost Core Segment
text: Jack Henry (JKHY) extends its long-standing partnership with MDT, helping credit unions enhance their technology modernization strategy.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Boosts Portfolio With Fraud Detection Platform
text: Jack Henry (JKHY) launches Financial Crimes Defender, a cloud-native fraud and anti-money laundering solution, helping banks and other credit institutions combat financial crimes.

title: Array and Jack Henry to Distribute Credit Management, Subscription Management, Online Privacy and Identity Protection Tools to Banno Customers and Users
text: INDIANAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Array and Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced plans to provide Array's credit management, online privacy and other popular personal finance tools for free to users who are on the Banno Digital Platform™ with the option to upgrade to premium features. More than 800 community banks and credit unions and 10 million registered users on Banno will soon have access to these tools through a phased rollout. The announcement was made at the Jack Henry Connect 2023 client.

title: Jack Henry Launches Next-Generation Financial Crimes Platform
text: AI-powered Financial Crimes Defender helps bankers detect and prevent fraud in real-time MONETT, Mo. , Oct. 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry™ (Nasdaq: JKHY) announced today that it is redefining fraud prevention with the initial roll out of Jack Henry Financial Crimes Defender™, a cloud-native fraud and anti-money laundering (AML) solution designed with real-time capabilities at the forefront.
